Class AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T extends BuiltInRule>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp
public abstract class AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp<T extends BuiltInRule> extends AbstractBuiltInRuleApp<T>
Application for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.
